text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm walking through a field,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pandorea ☆ pandorana!<n>Paphiopedilum ☆ insigne!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
O sparrow! I bless you with the power<n>of Mother
Nature. Rise, and become a<n>phoenix! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear Sweep Tosho chanting some<n>kind of spell...
but nothing in particular<n>happens after she
finishes.
choice_data_list: I heard something about a phoenix?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you interested in my magic?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Then I'll let you watch. I'm in<n>the middle
of some transformation<n>practi—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! The sparrow I was practicing<n>on! It's
gone...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Urgh... It took me an entire hour to find<n>it...
choice_data_list: How about I teach you a cool spell instead?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: A cool spell? Ooh, what's the<n>incantation?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spout off random terms that sound<n>impressive
enough—specifically, the<n>names of the special
symbols<n>websites require you to include in<n>
passwords.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Semicolon! Apostrophe! Circumflex<n>accent!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that sounds super powerful...<n>What does it
do?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! I'm gonna go try it out on<n>someone in the
hallway!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho leaves, glowing with<n>high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's do it! Once we find it, I can<n>show you
my transformation spell!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ah, there it is! Okay...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Protea ☆ longifolia! Paphiopedilum ☆<n>callosum!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
O sparrow! I bless you with the power<n>of Mother
Nature. Rise, and become a<n>phoenix! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Once again, nothing happens.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! Whyyy?! Why didn't it<n>work?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho continues recasting her<n>spell until
the day grows old and the<n>sun goes down... but
the sparrow<n>unfortunately remains a sparrow.
